property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;%JAVA_HOME% in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Ansh\Downloads\apache-jmeter-5.6.3 in;C:\Program Files\Apache\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.15 in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Ansh\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\Ansh\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.3 in;C:\Users\Ansh\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22 in;C:\Users\Ansh\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Ansh\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\Ansh\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\Ansh\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE in;c:\Users\Ansh\.antigravity-ide\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0-universal undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate GET notes returns list and responds within 2 seconds (Scenario C)", "API Scenarios"](1)
testcase.system-out:
@api Scenario: Validate GET notes returns list and responds within 2 seconds (Scenario C) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/api/notes_api.feature:5&amp#27;[0m
@ui Scenario: Validate successful login via UI with credentials (Scenario A) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/ui/notes_ui.feature:5&amp#27;[0m Ensured UI/E2E user 'ansh@gmail.com' exists. Ensured API user 'ansh_api@gmail.com' exists. Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh_api@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI log in via API with credentials from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iLogInViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m API Response time: 430 ms (Calculated: 436 ms) &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI retrieve all my notes via API with the authorization token&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iRetrieveAllNotesViaApi()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response body should contain the notes &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"data"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m array&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.responseBodyShouldContainNotesArray(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m REST Assured measured time: 430 ms [PERFORMANCE-API] 2026-05-31 00:58:08.829 | [API] | Scenario: Validate GET notes returns list and responds within 2 seconds (Scenario C) | Endpoint: GET /notes | Response Time: 430 ms &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe API response time should be less than &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m2000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m milliseconds&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.apiResponseTimeShouldBeLessThan(int)&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate note deletion via DELETE notes ID (Scenario D)", "API Scenarios"](2)
testcase.system-out: @api Scenario: Validate note deletion via DELETE notes ID (Scenario D) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/api/notes_api.feature:12&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh_api@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI log in via API with credentials from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iLogInViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI have at least one note created via API using temp note config data&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iHaveAtLeastOneNoteCreatedViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m Retrieved note ID: 6a1b3a4b51ccbd0297d56d8d for note 'Temp Note for Deletion' &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI retrieve the ID of the temp note from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iRetrieveIdOfTempNoteFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the note with that retrieved ID via API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iDeleteNoteWithRetrievedId()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe note deletion response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.noteDeletionResponseStatusShouldBe(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe temp note from config should be absent from the GET notes API list&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.tempNoteFromConfigShouldBeAbsent()&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: May 31, 2026 12:58:10 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 May 31, 2026 12:58:10 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate note count in GET notes increases by 1 after creating a new note (Scenario L-API)", "API Scenarios"](3)
testcase.system-out: @api Scenario: Validate note count in GET notes increases by 1 after creating a new note (Scenario L-API) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/api/notes_api.feature:22&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI open the Notes App home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iOpenNotesAppHomePage()&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh_api@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI log in via API with credentials from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iLogInViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m Recorded baseline note count: 0 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI record the current note count from the API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iRecordCurrentNoteCountFromApi()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a note via API using temp note config data&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iCreateNoteViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m [PERFORMANCE-UI] 2026-05-31 00:58:17.896 | [UI] | Scenario: Validate successful login via UI with credentials (Scenario A) | Page: Home Page | Navigation Time: 5528 ms | DOM Ready Time: 1086 ms &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI measure and log UI performance timings for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Home Page"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iMeasureAndLogUiPerformanceTimingsFor(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Note count — before: 0, after: 1 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe note count from the API should have increased by &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.noteCountShouldHaveIncreasedBy(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate POST notes response time is less than 3000 milliseconds (Scenario M-API)", "API Scenarios"](4)
testcase.system-out: @ui Scenario: Validate note creation via UI and immediate appearance in list (Scenario B) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/ui/notes_ui.feature:14&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI log in via API with credentials from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iLogInViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m POST /notes response time: 762 ms &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a note via API using temp note config data and record the response time&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iCreateNoteFromConfigAndRecordTime()&amp#27;[0m [PERFORMANCE-API] 2026-05-31 00:58:21.165 | [API] | Scenario: Validate POST notes response time is less than 3000 milliseconds (Scenario M-API) | Endpoint: POST /notes | Response Time: 762 ms &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe POST notes API response time should be less than &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m3000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m milliseconds&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.postNotesResponseTimeShouldBeLessThan(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate DELETE notes response time is less than 3000 milliseconds (Scenario N-API)", "API Scenarios"](5)
testcase.system-out: @api Scenario: Validate DELETE notes response time is less than 3000 milliseconds (Scenario N-API) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/api/notes_api.feature:33&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh_api@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI log in via API with credentials from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iLogInViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI have at least one note created via API using temp note config data&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iHaveAtLeastOneNoteCreatedViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m Retrieved note ID: 6a1b3a5851ccbd0297d56dda for note 'Temp Note for Deletion' &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI retrieve the ID of the temp note from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iRetrieveIdOfTempNoteFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m DELETE /notes/{id} response time: 584 ms &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the note with that retrieved ID via API and record the response time&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iDeleteNoteWithRetrievedIdAndRecordTime()&amp#27;[0m [PERFORMANCE-API] 2026-05-31 00:58:25.510 | [API] | Scenario: Validate DELETE notes response time is less than 3000 milliseconds (Scenario N-API) | Endpoint: DELETE /notes/{id} | Response Time: 584 ms &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe DELETE notes API response time should be less than &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m3000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m milliseconds&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.deleteNotesResponseTimeShouldBeLessThan(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate DELETE notes returns 404 for a non-existent note ID (Scenario O-API)", "API Scenarios"](6)
testcase.system-out: @api @negative Scenario: Validate DELETE notes returns 404 for a non-existent note ID (Scenario O-API) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/api/notes_api.feature:41&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI am successfully logged in to the UI dashboard with email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ansh@gmail.com"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"12345678"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iAmSuccessfullyLoggedInToUi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh_api@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI log in via API with credentials from config&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iLogInViaApiFromConfig()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI click the &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"+ Add Note"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iClickAddNoteButton(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Set category to: Work (React-safe native setter) &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select Category &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Work"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iSelectCategory(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Title set to: Capstone Test Note &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter Title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Capstone Test Note"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterTitle(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Description set to: Automation testing note for capstone TC-UI-02 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter Description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Automation testing note for capstone TC-UI-02"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterDescription(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m DELETE non-existent note status: 404 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI attempt to delete a note with a non-existent ID via API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iAttemptToDeleteNoteWithNonExistentId()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe delete response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.deleteResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate API returns 401 when using an invalid auth token (Scenario P-API)", "API Scenarios"](7)
testcase.system-out: @api @negative Scenario: Validate API returns 401 when using an invalid auth token (Scenario P-API) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/api/notes_api.feature:47&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh_api@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. GET /notes with invalid token status: 401 &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI send a GET notes request with an invalid auth token&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.iSendGetNotesWithInvalidToken()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe API response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m401&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.apiResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe API response body message should indicate unauthorized access&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.NoteApiSteps.apiResponseBodyMessageShouldIndicateUnauthorized()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate successful login via UI with credentials (Scenario A)", "UI Scenarios"](1)
testcase.system-out: @api Scenario: Validate POST notes response time is less than 3000 milliseconds (Scenario M-API) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/api/notes_api.feature:28&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Email set to: ansh@gmail.com &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ansh@gmail.com"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the UI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterEmailOnUi(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Password set (length: 8) &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"12345678"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the UI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterPasswordOnUi(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Element click intercepted for By.cssSelector: button[type='submit']. Retrying with JS click. &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI click the Login button on the UI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iClickLoginButtonOnUi()&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh_api@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI should observe the dashboard page after successful submit&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iShouldObserveDashboardPage()&amp#27;[0m [PERFORMANCE-UI] 2026-05-31 00:58:20.077 | [UI] | Scenario: Validate successful login via UI with credentials (Scenario A) | Page: Dashboard Page | Navigation Time: 5528 ms | DOM Ready Time: 1086 ms &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI measure and log UI performance timings for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Dashboard Page"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iMeasureAndLogUiPerformanceTimingsFor(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate note creation via UI and immediate appearance in list (Scenario B)", "UI Scenarios"](2)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI click &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Save"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iClickSave(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Observed Note Title on Dashboard: 'Capstone Test Note' &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI should observe the note &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Capstone Test Note"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m immediately in the UI list&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iShouldObserveNoteImmediately(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate error message shown for invalid login credentials (Scenario G)", "UI Scenarios"](3)
testcase.system-out: @ui @negative Scenario: Validate error message shown for invalid login credentials (Scenario G) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/ui/notes_ui.feature:24&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI open the Notes App home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iOpenNotesAppHomePage()&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Email set to: ansh@gmail.com &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ansh@gmail.com"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the UI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterEmailOnUi(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Password set (length: 11) &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"wrongpass99"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the UI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterPasswordOnUi(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Element click intercepted for By.cssSelector: button[type='submit']. Retrying with JS click. &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI click the Login button on the UI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iClickLoginButtonOnUi()&amp#27;[0m [LoginPage] Error message found via By.cssSelector: [data-testid='alert-message']: Incorrect email address or password Observed Login Error: Incorrect email address or password &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI should see the UI error message containing &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Invalid"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m or &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"incorrect"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iShouldSeeUiErrorMessage(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: May 31, 2026 12:58:43 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 May 31, 2026 12:58:43 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate note creation with Home category appears in the UI list (Scenario L)", "UI Scenarios"](4)

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate deleting a note via UI removes it from the dashboard (Scenario N)", "UI Scenarios"](6)
testcase.system-out: @ui Scenario: Validate deleting a note via UI removes it from the dashboard (Scenario N) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/ui/notes_ui.feature:50&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. Element click intercepted for By.cssSelector: button[type='submit']. Retrying with JS click. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI am successfully logged in to the UI dashboard with email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ansh@gmail.com"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"12345678"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iAmSuccessfullyLoggedInToUi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI click the &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"+ Add Note"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iClickAddNoteButton(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Set category to: Work (React-safe native setter) &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select Category &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Work"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iSelectCategory(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Title set to: Note To Delete UI &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter Title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Note To Delete UI"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterTitle(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [CommonUiSteps] Description set to: This note will be deleted via UI &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter Description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"This note will be deleted via UI"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iEnterDescription(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI click &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Save"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m on the form&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iClickSave(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Element click intercepted. Retrying with JS click. [DashboardPage] Clicked note-delete-confirm button. &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the note &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Note To Delete UI"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m via the UI dashboard&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iDeleteNoteViaUiDashboard(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe note &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Note To Delete UI"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should not be visible on the dashboard&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.theNoteShouldNotBeVisibleOnDashboard(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate UI-created note data matches API GET notes response exactly (Scenario E)", "E2E Hybrid Integration Scenarios"](1)
testcase.system-out:
@e2e Scenario: Validate UI-created note data matches API GET notes response exactly (Scenario E) [90m# src/test/resources/features/e2e/notes_e2e.feature:5[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. [32mGiven [0m[32mI open the Notes App home page[0m [90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iOpenNotesAppHomePage()[0m [32mAnd [0m[32mI login via UI with email [0m[32m[1m"ansh@gmail.com"[0m[32m and password [0m[32m[1m"12345678"[0m [90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.iLoginViaUi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)[0m [DashboardPage] Set category to: Personal (React-safe native setter) [DashboardPage] Clicked note-submit button [DashboardPage] Modal closed successfully. [32mWhen [0m[32mI create a new note with category [0m[32m[1m"Personal"[0m[32m, title [0m[32m[1m"Budget Plan"[0m[32m, and description [0m[32m[1m"Monthly expense tracker"[0m [90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iCreateNewNote(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)[0m DEBUG - Note Card HTML:
Budget Plan

Monthly expense tracker

Discover more
Programming
Open Source
REST API practice
Website testing services
Automation Testing tools
Web Browsers
Web Design & Development
Playwright login tests

May 30, 2026 at 19:30:50

View
[32mThen [0m[32mthe UI note titled [0m[32m[1m"Budget Plan"[0m[32m should display category [0m[32m[1m"Personal"[0m[32m, title [0m[32m[1m"Budget Plan"[0m[32m, and description [0m[32m[1m"Monthly expense tracker"[0m [90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.theUiNoteShouldDisplayFields(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)[0m API Found note title: Budget Plan [32mAnd [0m[32mI retrieve note details for [0m[32m[1m"Budget Plan"[0m[32m via GET notes API[0m [90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.iRetrieveNoteDetailsViaApi(java.lang.String)[0m [32mThen [0m[32mthe API note fields should exactly match the UI note fields[0m [90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.apiNoteFieldsShouldExactlyMatchUi()[0m

testcase.system-out: @e2e Scenario: Validate UI-created note persists in the list after a full page refresh (Scenario Q) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/e2e/notes_e2e.feature:22&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI open the Notes App home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iOpenNotesAppHomePage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI login via UI with email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ansh@gmail.com"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"12345678"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.iLoginViaUi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [DashboardPage] Set category to: Home (React-safe native setter) [DashboardPage] Clicked note-submit button [DashboardPage] Modal closed successfully. &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a new note with category &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Home"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Persist After Refresh"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Should survive a reload"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iCreateNewNote(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI refresh the UI browser page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.iRefreshUiBrowser()&amp#27;[0m Observed Note Title on Dashboard: 'Persist After Refresh' &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe note &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Persist After Refresh"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be absent from the UI list is false&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.noteShouldBePresentInUiListAfterRefresh(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate the UI note count decreases by 1 after deleting a note via API (Scenario T)", "E2E Hybrid Integration Scenarios"](5)
testcase.system-out: @e2e Scenario: Validate the UI note count decreases by 1 after deleting a note via API (Scenario T) &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/e2e/notes_e2e.feature:38&amp#27;[0m Cleaned up all existing notes for 'ansh@gmail.com' to guarantee a pristine database state. &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI open the Notes App home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.CommonUiSteps.iOpenNotesAppHomePage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI login via UI with email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ansh@gmail.com"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"12345678"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# note-submit button [DashboardPage] Modal closed successfully. &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a new note with category &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Personal"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Count Check Note"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Will be deleted via API"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# the current UI note count&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.iRecordCurrentUiNoteCount()&amp#27;[0m E2E Retrieved note ID for API deletion: 6a1b3b6c51ccbd0297d56f3e &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI retrieve the ID of the note titled &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Count Check Note"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m via GET notes API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.iRetrieveIdOfNoteViaApi(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI execute DELETE note for that ID via API&amp#27;[0m com.practice.notes.stepdefinitions.E2eSteps.iRefreshUiBrowser()&amp#27;[0m UI note count — before: 1, after: 0 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe UI note count should have decreased by
